name: Networking & Connectivity
description: Enterprise networking solutions spanning LAN, WAN, WLAN, and SD-WAN. Includes switches, routers, access points, firewalls, and network management platforms. Bechtle designs, deploys, and supports campus and branch network architectures.
differentiators: End-to-end network design from assessment to deployment
Multi-vendor expertise across all major networking platforms
Integration with security and managed services offerings
